title: retatrutide patient journey report generation and AI query integration baseline
commit_message: Add Certiaura Build 0043 retatrutide patient journey report generation and AI query integration baseline

reissue.reason: Windows PowerShell 5.1 parser defect caused by non-ASCII punctuation in a UTF-8-without-BOM script
reissue.corrective_control: All .ps1 files ASCII-only with repository-normalised LF; preflight and regression gates reject non-ASCII bytes
